response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and software craftsman with strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he completely lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows required for this role. Furthermore, his background does not align with the required capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain expertise. Given the absence of both the core technical stack and the required domain knowledge, he is not a fit for this specific position.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on CI/CD, TDD, and software craftsmanship.
Previous exposure to the financial sector through his work at RIDE Capital, albeit utilizing a different technology stack.
Demonstrated leadership, technical communication, and initiative, including founding an open-source platform and conducting workshops.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, showing only a brief 7-month stint using C/C++ in 2014-2015.
No demonstrated experience with Windows-specific platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
Missing the required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
